headline: Google's AI search is so broken it can 'disregard' what you're looking for
summary: Google's AI Overviews are displaying unusual chatbot-like responses. A search for 'disregard' yielded an AI chatbot response instead of a summary. This highlights a current problem with the AI Overviews functionality.

headline: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: The AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter is on sale for a great price. It allows wireless headphones to connect to in-flight entertainment. This deal is perfect for the upcoming summer travel season.

headline: Meta's Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
summary: Meta launched 'Forum,' a new iPhone app combining Facebook Groups with an AI chatbot. It offers a dedicated space similar to Reddit but with an AI component. Forum aims to replace common 'Reddit' Google searches with an internal AI solution.

headline: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
summary: Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, is reportedly underperforming and has low usage. A Reuters report indicates minimal government use of Grok last year. The article suggests Grok is not living up to its 'truth-seeking' claims.

headline: I Found the Most Interesting Shrek Merch Hidden in the Internet's Swamp
summary: An article highlights unique Shrek merchandise found online. The search was inspired by the upcoming Shrek 5 and long-standing fandom. Features a curated list of fascinating Shrek-themed items.

headline: Rick and Morty Returns for Season 9 - Here's When You Can Watch New Episodes
summary: Rick and Morty is officially renewed for its ninth season. New episodes will be available to stream sooner than previous seasons. Details on release dates and streaming platforms are provided.

headline: The iBuypower Gaming PC With AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and 5090 GPU Drops Below $5,000
summary: An iBuypower gaming PC deal features a high-end AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU. It includes a powerful 5090 GPU, 32GB DDR5 RAM, and a 4TB SSD. The system is now available for under $5,000, offering significant savings.

headline: Spartacus: House of Ashur Reportedly Canceled After Just 1 Season
summary: Steven S. DeKnight's series, Spartacus: House Of Ashur, is reportedly canceled. The show was produced for Starz and concludes after only one season. Fans express disappointment over the early cancellation.

headline: At least 90 dead in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
summary: A coal mine explosion in northern China has killed at least 90 people. The incident occurred on Friday evening, local time. State media confirmed the significant death toll.

headline: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
summary: Putin vows retaliation, alleging Ukraine struck a student dormitory. Ukraine claims it targeted a Russian elite drone military unit. The incident occurred in a Moscow-occupied region, escalating tensions.

headline: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend
summary: The UK anticipates an intensification of hot weather over the bank holiday. Amber heat health alerts are issued for parts of England, including the Midlands and Southeast. Authorities advise precautions as temperatures rise significantly.

headline: Attorney general to review teen boys' rape sentences
summary: The Attorney General will review sentences for three teenage boys. They were convicted of raping two girls but received non-custodial sentences. The review follows public concern over the perceived leniency of the sentences.
